---
title: "test_prompt_linter_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_prompt_linter_empire.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.15
style_score: 3.55
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.80
---

## Intent
The `test_prompt_linter_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestPromptLinterEmpire, test_parse_prompty_vars, test_audit_python_invocation_dict, test_audit_python_invocation_kwargs, test_audit_python_invocation_format, test_calculate_integrity_score. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestPromptLinterEmpire, test_parse_prompty_vars, test_audit_python_invocation_dict, test_audit_python_invocation_kwargs, test_audit_python_invocation_format, test_calculate_integrity_score. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.prompt_linter](file://src.core.prompt_linter)

### Exports
- `TestPromptLinterEmpire`
- `test_parse_prompty_vars`
- `test_audit_python_invocation_dict`
- `test_audit_python_invocation_kwargs`
- `test_audit_python_invocation_format`
- `test_calculate_integrity_score`
